name: PER_ROLE_MAPPINGS_
description: Stores the mappings of the different roles.

columns.Name: ROLE_MAPPING_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Defines whether Assignment Status is active or inactive.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Date from which the Role Mapping is active.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Date till when the Role Mapping is active.

columns.Name: MAPPING_NAME
columns.Comments: Name for the Role Mapping

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRW_BUSINESS_UNITS table.

columns.Name: LEGAL_EMPLOYER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_LEGAL_EMPLOYERS table.

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Department Identifier for Matching to Person Assignment

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_JOBS_F table.

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F table.

columns.Name: GRADE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_GRADES_F table.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_LOCATIONS table.

columns.Name: CURRENT_MANAGER_FLAG
columns.Comments: ?Flag to Indicate Matching to Manager Assignments

columns.Name: MANAGER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Manager Type for Matching to Person Assignment

columns.Name: USER_PERSON_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: User Person Type Identifier for Matching to Person Assignment

columns.Name: SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
columns.Comments: System Person Type for Matching to Person Assignment

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPES table.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Assignment Type for Matching to Person Assignment

columns.Name: ALL_ROLES_REQUESTABLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to Indicate That All Roles are Requestable for Persons with Matching Assignment

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ROLE_ID
columns.Comments: ?Resource Role Identifier for Matching

columns.Name: PARTY_USAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: ?Party Usage Code for Matching

columns.Name: RESPONSIBILITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Responsibility Type for Matching to Person Area of Responsibility

columns.Name: CONTACT_ROLE
columns.Comments: Contact Role for Matching to Role of Contacts

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: RULE_TYPE
columns.Comments: autoprovisioning rule type

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: The country for which this role mapping applies. Implies all Locations within the specified country.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: The Legislative Data Group for which this role mapping applies

columns.Name: COLUMN_NAME1
columns.Comments: Column name corresponding to flexfield segment.

columns.Name: OPERATOR1
columns.Comments: Operator for condition.

columns.Name: VALUE1
columns.Comments: Value to be used for condition.

columns.Name: COLUMN_NAME2
columns.Comments: Column name corresponding to flexfield segment.

columns.Name: OPERATOR2
columns.Comments: Operator for condition.

columns.Name: VALUE2
columns.Comments: Value to be used for condition.

columns.Name: COLUMN_NAME3
columns.Comments: Column name corresponding to flexfield segment.

columns.Name: OPERATOR3
columns.Comments: Operator for condition.

columns.Name: VALUE3
columns.Comments: Value to be used for condition.

columns.Name: COLUMN_NAME4
columns.Comments: Column name corresponding to flexfield segment.

columns.Name: OPERATOR4
columns.Comments: Operator for condition.

columns.Name: VALUE4
columns.Comments: Value to be used for condition.

columns.Name: COLUMN_NAME5
columns.Comments: Column name corresponding to flexfield segment.

columns.Name: OPERATOR5
columns.Comments: Operator for condition.

columns.Name: VALUE5
columns.Comments: Value to be used for condition.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
